title: Delete an item from multiple boards
excerpt: Would like to be able to delete an item from multiple boards at once.

posts.author: liza5495 (Elizabeth Evans)
posts.cookedHtml: Would like to be able to delete an item from multiple boards at once.

posts.author: kaylak (Kayla K)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi @liza5495 ,

To have items across multiple boards are you utilizing the duplicate and move feature, or are you using another method?

posts.author: liza5495 (Elizabeth Evans)
posts.cookedHtml: I have an automation that duplicates them

posts.author: kaylak (Kayla K)
posts.cookedHtml: Thanks for confirming, I do not have a work around for this use case. This is a great feature request since bulk actions are not available when you search which could help with this request.
